title: Flaky Jamaican Cherries Crumble
description: A light and flaky fermented crumble dish featuring tart cherries, infused with a tadka for added flavor and made in a low-calorie-friendly manner.

ingredients.name: 1 cup fresh or frozen cherries, pitted and chopped
6 tablespoons unsalted butter, cut into small pieces

instructions: In a saucepan, mix cherries with cornstarch and water. Bring to a boil over medium heat until thickened.
While the cherry mixture is cooking, prepare the crumble topping by mixing flour and sugar together, then adding butter pieces and stirring until blended into crumbs.
Press half of the crumb mixture evenly on top of the cherry filling in a 9x13-inch baking dish. Pour the cherry mixture over the crumble layer.
Bake for about 25 minutes or until golden brown and bubbly. Cool before serving.
